sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71201" key="nuktilamph/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νυκτῐ-λαμπής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">λάμπω</etym>) epith. of the ark of Danae, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δούρατι νυκτιλαμπεῖ</foreign> dub. l. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:37:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">37.8</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
